scope: B9.0 dry-run contract checks (plumbing only, NO scientific claim). Maps each dry-run world -> b9_state + primary reason; records the enforcement invariants verified. Synthetic toy substrate (NOT Lee2019, NOT validation).

VALID_boundary_signal.note: genuine C x Z concept detected by the exact (block,Y_design) randomization null

VALID_underpowered_size_gate.note: crossfit RAN but n_eligible<20 -> size_ok BLOCKS the alert (exercises the alert-conjunction size gate)

INVALID_pinned_hash_corrupt.note: present table, adherent C, but corrupted pin -> hash integrity fails

INVALID_executed_ydesign_relabel.note: C adherent but Y_design relabeled (balance preserved) -> full-tuple adherence fails (round-2 fix)

enforcement_invariants_verified.contract_first: every refuse world has ran_test=false -- the p-value is NEVER reached on an invalid/insufficient contract
enforcement_invariants_verified.states_disjoint_and_declared: every state is exactly one of the 5 declared; no NO_CONCEPT, no None
enforcement_invariants_verified.adherence_full_tuple: executed (C, Y_design, subject, microblock) must match the pinned table row-for-row (both C-deviation AND Y_design-relabel refuse)
enforcement_invariants_verified.provenance_attestation: manifest.generated_before_recording AND manifest.Y_design_pre_assignment must be True
enforcement_invariants_verified.z_t_blind_validator: check_contract reads only (C, Y_design, subject, microblock, table) -- no Z, no T, no p-values
enforcement_invariants_verified.no_fitted_null: exact null = uniform permutation of C within (subject, microblock, Y_design); no fitted Y|Z or C|Z propensity, no selection on Z
enforcement_invariants_verified.reasons_disjoint_primary: each refuse world's PRIMARY reason present; single-condition strata no longer spuriously fire cxy_design_imbalance
enforcement_invariants_verified.size_gate_binding: VALID_underpowered_size_gate: crossfit ran, n_eligible<20, NO alert

disclosed_coverage_gaps: SAMPLER_INVALID + the contract-level nsup<min_support branch are reachable DEFENSIVE fail-closed states a valid balanced contract cannot synthetically trigger (the null holds Y_design fixed -> ninv~0; support scales with the subjects needed for eligibility). Verified reachable by code inspection; they guard real-data pathologies in B9.1.
not_science: This is IMPLEMENTATION / contract-feasibility only. It demonstrates the state machine + validator behave as specified on a synthetic toy. It is NOT scientific evidence, NOT a power claim, NOT validation. B9.1 (real prospective acquisition or an existing genuinely-pre-randomized dataset) is a separate authorization.
